# Hamza Yeşilmen

> Senior AI Engineer and Engineering Lead at Mountain AI (mountain.com.tr). 5+ years across AI, embedded systems, and backend development. Builds production LLM, RAG and AI-agent (MCP) systems, FastAPI backends, and ESP32 hardware-to-cloud products.

## Profile
- Name: Hamza Yeşilmen
- Role: Senior AI Engineer and Engineering Lead at Mountain AI
- Location: İskenderun, Hatay, Türkiye
- Email: resmiyslmn@gmail.com
- Focus: LLM, RAG, AI Agents (MCP), Voice AI, Computer Vision, FastAPI, Python, Rust, ESP32, Embedded, IoT

## Highlights
- Accepted patch merged into NVIDIA Jetson Linux (jetson-io.py fix)
- USOM-confirmed security researcher (Türkiye National Cybersecurity Authority)
- Creator of a popular open-source Forza DualSense project
- Engineering Lead at Mountain AI: HireUp360, AI-assisted CAD and nesting, KromAssistant, İspatApp
